howItWorks.title: From Ocean to
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps to the freshest seafood you've ever tasted. No middlemen, no delays — just pure freshness.
howItWorks.freeDelivery: Free delivery on orders above AED 999

steps.title: Browse & Pick
steps.description: Explore our daily catch — from Pomfret and Prawns to Squid and Surmai. Filter by type or size.

steps.title: Add to Cart & Pay
steps.description: Choose your quantity, pick a delivery slot, and pay securely via Cards or Cash on Delivery.

steps.title: We Pack & Ship
steps.description: Your order is hygienically cleaned, vacuum-packed with ice, and dispatched in insulated cold-chain boxes.

steps.title: Cook & Enjoy!
steps.description: Receive fresh seafood at your door — ready to cook. Try our chef-curated recipes for the perfect dish.

freshness.title: So Fresh, You Can
freshness.subtitle: We obsess over freshness so you don't have to. Here's how we make sure every piece of seafood reaches you at peak quality.

promises.title: Boat-to-Box in Hours
promises.desc: Our fish is sourced directly from fishing harbours every morning — never from cold storage.

promises.title: Unbroken Cold Chain
promises.desc: From the moment we pack to the second you unbox — temperature stays between 0°C–4°C.

promises.title: Delivered Same Day
promises.desc: Morning orders reach you by evening. We don't warehouse fish — it goes straight to you.

promises.title: Freshness Guarantee
promises.desc: If it doesn't pass the smell & texture test, we'll refund you instantly — no questions asked.
